data_map.title: Data map
data_map.lead: How parlhub's data fits together. Each card is a catalogue you can search and explore. The lines show how the entities connect. Pick anything to dive in.
data_map.diagram_label: Diagram of parlhub's data entities and how they connect

people.label: People
people.desc: MPs and officials: profiles, votes, speeches and mandates.

bodies.label: Bodies
bodies.desc: Parliaments, councils and committees, with their members and business.

groups.label: Groups
groups.desc: Parties, factions and committees: membership and voting cohesion.

affairs.label: Affairs
affairs.desc: Parliamentary business: motions, bills and their outcomes.

votings.label: Votings
votings.desc: Roll-call votes: who voted how, and when.

meetings.label: Meetings
meetings.desc: Sessions and sittings: agendas, votes and speeches.

speeches.label: Speeches
speeches.desc: Verbatim transcripts of what was said, fully searchable.

texts.label: Texts
texts.desc: Published text blocks and press material.

documents.label: Documents
documents.desc: Files and attachments linked to the business.

interests.label: Interests
interests.desc: Declared interests and lobby ties of members.

organizations.label: Organizations
organizations.desc: The organisations behind those declared interests.

source.heading: About the data
source.body: All data comes from OpenParlData.ch. parlhub imports that raw data and reshapes it only slightly. The entities and relationships shown here mirror the source.

metas.data_map.title: Data map
metas.data_map.desc: An overview map of parlhub's data: people, groups, bodies, affairs, votings, meetings, speeches, documents and lobbying ties, and how they connect. Every node links to its catalogue.
